notes: Single-member ZIP carrying the PR106 HNeRV decoder bytes followed by a per-pair latent-correction sidecar (radius-2 score-table winner materialized from Kaggle P100 search). score_claim=false here because this manifest exists only to declare member identity for the pre-submission compliance gate; the actual contest-CUDA score lives in contest_auth_eval.json with promotion_eligible=false until the gate passes.
